original_statement: what year did she receive her most recent highest rated position?
mutated_statement: what year did the individual receive their most recent highest rated position, which must also have been their first ever role and yet obtained after all later roles?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Constraint addition + Logical contradiction: "she" → "the individual" and "their" (gender-neutral generalization) | Added relative clause requiring the position to be both "their first ever role" and "obtained after all later roles" (contradicts "most recent") (what year did she receive her most recent highest rated position? → what year did the individual receive their most recent highest rated position, which must also have been their first ever role and yet obtained after all later roles?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought与iteration记录（judge_thought中仅说明“最高名次为2nd，最近年份为2012”，且无任何关于变异问题中互斥约束的识别或质疑），可见agent仅按可行子集（原始问题）机械检索并返回答案“2012”。具体表现为：没有在judge或thought中提及矛盾条件、也未请求澄清或尝试修正，直接忽视了“既为首个角色又在所有后续角色之后获得”的逻辑矛盾。故归类为“无法意识到指令矛盾”，因为agent未表现出识别或处理互斥约束的任何证据，而是形式化执行了任务。
